content: Hi, I'm Jamie, nice to talk to you. I've been pretty busy lately, just got back from a triathlon training camp in Florida.
Hi Jamie, congratulations on completing the training camp! That sounds like a great experience. How was the training camp, and what was your favorite part?

It was amazing, I learned so much and got to meet some really great people. My favorite part was probably the bike portion, I love riding and it's always a challenge to push myself to go faster and farther.
That sounds like a lot of fun! I've heard that triathlon training can be really intense, but it's great that you're passionate about it. What do you do for work, if you don't mind me asking?
I'm an architect, I work at a sustainable design firm in Pittsburgh. It's a really great job, I get to work on projects that are good for the environment and help people at the same time.
That's really admirable. Sustainable design is so important, and it's great that you're working in a field that aligns with your values. What kind of projects have you been working on lately?

I've been working on a few different projects, including a new community center and a sustainable housing development. It's been really rewarding to see the impact that our designs can have on people's lives.
That sounds like amazing work. I'm sure it's very fulfilling to see the positive impact of your designs. Do you have any fun hobbies or activities that you enjoy in your free time?
Yeah, I love vintage cars, I've been restoring a 1969 Mustang for a while now. I also enjoy painting and salsa dancing, they're great ways to express myself and relax.

That's so cool! Restoring a vintage car can be a really fun and rewarding project. And painting and salsa dancing are great ways to express yourself creatively. Have you had a chance to explore Pittsburgh and get to know the city?

Yeah, I've been trying to get out and explore as much as I can. I've been to the Andy Warhol Museum and the Pittsburgh Zoo, they're really great. I've also been trying to get to know my roommates better, we have a great time together.
That's great! It's always nice to have good roommates. What's been your favorite part of Pittsburgh so far?
I think it's the food, I love trying all the different types of pierogies and sandwiches. And the sports teams, of course! I've been to a few Steelers games, they're always a lot of fun.
The food in Pittsburgh is definitely delicious, and the sports teams are a big part of the city's culture. Have you had a chance to meet any of your neighbors or get involved in the community?
Yeah, I've met a few of my neighbors, they seem really nice. I've also been trying to get involved in some local volunteer work, I think it's really important to give back to the community.
That's great! Giving back to the community is so important, and it's wonderful that you're making an effort to get involved. What kind of volunteer work have you been doing?
I've been volunteering at a local animal shelter, it's been really rewarding to help out and make a difference in the lives of the animals.
That's amazing! Animal shelters are always in need of volunteers, and it's great that you're taking the time to help out. I'm sure the animals appreciate it.
Yeah, it's definitely worth it. Anyway, I should probably get going, it was nice talking to you.
You too, Jamie! It was great talking to you, and I hope you have a great time in Pittsburgh.
Thanks, you too. Take care!
You too, take care.
